Signup.title: Create account
Signup.accountDataDescription: Create your credentials to access Freelandoo
Signup.supervisedDescription: To create an underage account, enter the guardian code. The code is generated by an adult in their account at Account › Parental, and is valid for 24 hours.
Signup.acceptTermsPrefix: I have read and accept the
Signup.userTypeTitle: How do you plan to use Freelandoo?
Signup.userTypeDescription: You can change this later in your account.
Signup.iAmClientDesc: I want to hire professionals. Finish signup now.
Signup.iAmFreelancerDesc: I want to create a professional profile to receive inquiries.

Signup.errSignupFailed: Failed to create account. Try again.
Signup.errServer: Failed to connect to the server. Try again.
Signup.termsP1: By accessing and using the Freelandoo platform, you declare that you have read, understood, and fully agree to the terms.
Signup.termsP2: Freelandoo operates exclusively as a listing platform. It does not mediate negotiations, take part in agreements, or receive payments. All partnerships, prices, and deliveries are handled directly between the parties.
Signup.termsP3: Each user is responsible for the information disclosed in their profile. Freelandoo is not responsible for breach of agreements, delays, quality of deliveries, or losses.

AdvertiseServices.hero.title: Advertise your services and be found by people who need you
AdvertiseServices.hero.subtitle: Create your professional profile, appear in Freelandoo machines, and receive direct inquiries from people interested in what you do.
AdvertiseServices.hero.description: Freelandoo is an intelligent showcase for professionals, freelancers, creators, and service providers. You pay a one-time activation, keep your profile active, and can be found by clients looking for exactly the kind of solution you offer.
AdvertiseServices.hero.note: No commission on closed services. Direct contact via WhatsApp.
AdvertiseServices.benefits.title: Your professional presence in a showcase built to create opportunities
AdvertiseServices.benefits.description: Many professionals rely only on referrals, social networks, or messaging groups to get clients. Freelandoo organizes your presence in a public profile with clear information, portfolio, services, location, and contact options.
AdvertiseServices.steps.title: From signup to showcase in a few steps
AdvertiseServices.included.title: What you get when you advertise
AdvertiseServices.included.note: Freelandoo organizes your presence so clients better understand who you are, what you do, and how to contact you.
AdvertiseServices.activation.title: A simple one-time activation
AdvertiseServices.activation.description: Freelandoo activation costs R$ 300 as a one-time payment. This keeps your profile active on the platform and lets it participate in the public showcase, according to the available rules and categories.
AdvertiseServices.activation.notice: Activation increases your exposure inside the platform, but does not guarantee hiring. Negotiation, prices, deadlines, and deliveries are handled directly between client and professional.
AdvertiseServices.audience.title: Made for people who work, create, serve, and solve
AdvertiseServices.audience.description: Freelandoo is for professionals who want to be found in a more organized way.
AdvertiseServices.final.title: Your work deserves to be seen
AdvertiseServices.final.description: Create your profile, activate it, and start building your presence on Freelandoo.

HireProfessionals.hero.title: Find professionals without bureaucracy
HireProfessionals.hero.subtitle: Search by swarm, profession, state, and city. View profiles, review portfolios, and talk directly on WhatsApp.
HireProfessionals.hero.description: Freelandoo helps you find professionals simply. You do not need to sign up to search. Just choose what you need, filter the results, and contact the professional directly.
HireProfessionals.hero.note: Negotiation is direct between client and professional.
HireProfessionals.steps.title: Hiring is simpler
HireProfessionals.categories.title: Professionals for different needs
HireProfessionals.transparency.title: Transparency from the start
HireProfessionals.transparency.description: In contracts agreed directly between the parties (over WhatsApp or outside the platform), Freelandoo does not mediate the negotiation, does not set prices, does not guarantee deliveries, and does not receive the payments. In transactions made inside the platform — Store purchases, paid bookings, and courses — Freelandoo processes the payment and applies the guarantee period described in the Marketplace Terms.
HireProfessionals.doesDo.title: Freelandoo helps with
HireProfessionals.doesNotDo.title: Freelandoo does not do
HireProfessionals.tips.title: Before closing a deal, agree on everything clearly
HireProfessionals.final.title: Find someone who solves it
HireProfessionals.final.description: Use the Freelandoo showcase to find professionals and start a direct conversation.

Pricing.hero.title: Simple pricing for professionals who want visibility
Pricing.hero.description: A one-time activation to keep your profile active in the Freelandoo showcase, with no commission on closed services.
Pricing.plan.title: Freelandoo profile activation
Pricing.plan.name: Activated professional profile
Pricing.plan.description: Keep your profile active on the platform and appear in Freelandoo's public showcase.
Pricing.commission.title: You pay for activation. The closed service is yours.
Pricing.commission.description: Freelandoo does not charge commission on services you close with clients. The platform works as a listing and connection showcase. After contact, negotiation happens directly between you and the client.
Pricing.notice.title: Exposure is not a promise of hiring
Pricing.notice.description: Activation increases your exposure inside the platform, but does not guarantee hiring, number of contacts, or revenue volume. Results depend on demand, profile quality, portfolio, location, category, activity, and the professional's own negotiation.
Pricing.faq.title: Pricing questions
Pricing.final.title: Ready to be seen?
Pricing.final.description: Activate your profile and put your services in a showcase built for direct connection.

HelpCenter.hero.title: Help center
HelpCenter.hero.description: Find answers about accounts, activation, profiles, swarms, services, scheduling, coupons, and safety.
HelpCenter.empty.title: No results found
HelpCenter.empty.description: Try another search or contact support directly.
HelpCenter.support.title: Didn't find what you needed?
HelpCenter.support.description: Reach Freelandoo via the email or WhatsApp below.

Community.hero.title: A community for people who make things happen
Community.hero.subtitle: Freelandoo brings together professionals, creators, providers, companies, and people looking for real solutions.
Community.hero.description: More than a showcase, Freelandoo is building a network of professionals connected by swarms, interests, services, and opportunities.
Community.connections.title: Connections that go beyond the profile
Community.connections.description: The Freelandoo community exists to strengthen people who work independently, create, provide services, and want to be found. The idea is to bring people closer, create visibility, and make new professional connections easier.
Community.audience.title: For freelancers, providers, creators, and companies
Community.audience.description: The community can bring together people who provide services, create content, promote, hire, and want to build a professional presence.
Community.status.title: We are building this network
Community.status.description: The Freelandoo community is evolving. New features, initiatives, and ways to participate may be added as the platform grows.

Careers.hero.title: Careers at Freelandoo
Careers.hero.subtitle: We are building a platform to connect professionals and opportunities in a simpler, more direct, and smarter way.
Careers.hero.description: Freelandoo is growing. We may not have open roles yet, but we want to keep the door open for people who identify with our vision.
Careers.building.title: A platform for professionals, creators, and providers
Careers.building.description: Our goal is to create an intelligent showcase where workers can show up better and people looking for services can find professionals more clearly.
Careers.building.label: We are developing features such as:
Careers.roles.title: People who can build with us
Careers.status.title: Right now, we are in the building phase
Careers.status.description: We may not have open roles yet, but we are open to meeting people who connect with Freelandoo's vision.
Careers.status.note: If you believe you can contribute with technology, product, design, marketing, community, or partnerships, follow the platform's evolution.

SafetyTips.hero.title: Safety tips
SafetyTips.hero.subtitle: Freelandoo connects people. Safety starts with information, clarity, and care in negotiations.
SafetyTips.hero.description: The platform helps clients and professionals find each other. In direct contracts, agreements, payments, and deliveries are handled between the parties; in transactions made inside the platform — Store, paid bookings, and courses — the rules of the Marketplace Terms apply.
SafetyTips.client.title: If you are hiring a professional
SafetyTips.pro.title: If you advertise your services
SafetyTips.role.title: What Freelandoo does
SafetyTips.role.description: Freelandoo acts as a platform for listing, connection, and — in some features — transaction mediation. In direct contracts it does not participate in the negotiation, the payment, or the delivery. In transactions inside the platform — Store, paid bookings, and courses — it processes the payment and applies the guarantee period described in the Marketplace Terms.
SafetyTips.final.title: Hire and advertise with more clarity
SafetyTips.final.description: Use the available information, talk carefully, and agree on everything before moving forward.

AboutUs.hero.title: A platform for people who make things happen
AboutUs.hero.subtitle: Freelandoo was born to make it easier to connect professionals, providers, creators, companies, and people who need to solve something.
AboutUs.hero.description: In a world where it is increasingly easy to create sites, apps, and profiles, the real challenge is creating useful connection. Freelandoo exists to organize professionals by intent, give visibility to people who work, and make the meeting between demand and solution easier.
AboutUs.vision.title: Less noise. More connection.
AboutUs.vision.p1: Freelandoo believes professionals need more than a social network. They need an organized showcase with clear filters, portfolio, services, and a simple way to get contacted.
AboutUs.vision.p2: For those searching, the platform shortens the path. For those advertising, it creates presence. For both, it makes the conversation easier.
AboutUs.values.title: What we stand for
AboutUs.platform.title: A showcase with machine logic
AboutUs.platform.description: Machines organize professionals by type of need. This allows clients to find profiles more intuitively and professionals to position themselves more clearly.
AboutUs.platform.label: Freelandoo brings together:
AboutUs.final.title: We are building a new way to find professionals
AboutUs.final.description: A simple, direct platform made for people who want to be seen and for people who need to solve something.

CasaViewsRegulamento.title: Casa Views Rules
CasaViewsRegulamento.intro: These Rules describe how the Casa Views reality show works: participants, ranking, merit-based prizes, and audience participation. Participation is free and prizes are awarded by performance and engagement, with no random draw.
CasaViewsRegulamento.footer.prefix: By participating in or interacting with Casa Views, you agree to these Rules. Also see our

Terms.intro: By accessing and using the Freelandoo platform, you declare that you have read, understood, and fully agree to the terms below.
Terms.footer.prefix: By using Freelandoo, you fully agree to these Terms of Use. Also see our

PrivacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
PrivacyPolicy.intro: Freelandoo values your privacy and is committed to protecting platform users' data. This policy explains how we collect, use, store, and share the information you provide.
PrivacyPolicy.footer.prefix: By using Freelandoo, you agree to this Privacy Policy. Also see our

CookiesPolicy.title: Cookies Policy
CookiesPolicy.intro: Freelandoo uses cookies and similar technologies to improve your platform experience, analyze performance, and provide essential features. This policy explains which cookies we use, why we use them, and how you can control your preferences.
CookiesPolicy.footer.prefix: By continuing to browse Freelandoo, you agree to this Cookies Policy. Also see our

SubscriptionTerms.title: Activation Terms
SubscriptionTerms.intro: These terms establish the rules for acquiring and using profile activation on Freelandoo.
SubscriptionTerms.footer.prefix: By activating and paying via Stripe, the user declares that they have read, understood, and fully agreed to this agreement. Also see our

AffiliateTerms.title: Affiliate Agreement and Coupon Use
AffiliateTerms.intro: This agreement regulates the use of the coupon system and participation in the Freelandoo affiliate program.
AffiliateTerms.footer.prefix: By generating or sharing a coupon, you agree to this agreement. Also see our

Tour.label: Hive Tour
Tour.welcome-1.title: Welcome to Freelandoo
Tour.welcome-1.content: Build your presence, sell services, showcase products and courses, and grow on the platform.
Tour.welcome-2.title: Your main account
Tour.welcome-2.content: Your account controls everything but does not sell services directly.
Tour.welcome-3.title: Create subprofiles to sell
Tour.welcome-3.content: To be found by clients and sell, use professional subprofiles.
Tour.welcome-4.title: Join the right Enxame
Tour.welcome-5.title: Use your Pollens
Tour.welcome-5.content: Pollens unlock banners, perks, and platform features.
Tour.welcome-6.title: Keep your profile active
Tour.welcome-6.content: Posts, interactions, and XP help ranking and discovery.
Tour.welcome-7.title: Start with your first subprofile
Tour.welcome-7.content: Create or complete a subprofile to enter the game.
Tour.account-1.title: Your base account
Tour.account-1.content: This is your main Freelandoo account. It stores data, pollens, coupons, and settings.
Tour.account-2.title: Security first
Tour.account-2.content: Keep your email verified and your data updated to protect your account.
Tour.account-3.title: Account is not a showcase
Tour.account-3.content: To appear to clients, create a subprofile.

Payments.title: PAYMENTS.
Payments.subtitle: Subscriptions, activations and sales balance in a single panel.
Payments.refundAmountSuffix: will be returned to your payment method. Your profile will be deactivated immediately.
Payments.refundAvailableNote: Available for 7 days after payment. This action cannot be undone.
Payments.refundIdsNote: Use these IDs with any Stripe support to track the refund. The amount may take 5 to 10 business days to appear on your statement.
Payments.emptyDescription: Activate your profile to appear in searches and receive job offers.
Payments.pendingProcessingNote: Payment processing. Didn't finish? Complete it below.
Payments.labelGenError: Couldn't generate the label right now — try again in a few minutes.

Wallet.courseAffiliateNote: Course and Affiliate are account-wide — they don't filter by subprofile.
Wallet.emptyDesc: When you sell in the Store, close a booking, sell a course or receive affiliate commission, it shows up here.
Wallet.financeIntro: Add up what comes in and goes out outside the platform. Fixed costs come in by themselves every month; the rest you log in one click.
Wallet.monthPositive: Congrats! You spent less than you earned this month. Keep it up.
Wallet.monthNegative: You spent more than you earned this month. Time to adjust.
Wallet.costEmpty: Log income and expenses to see the month's overview here.
Wallet.nothingYet: Nothing logged yet. Use the buttons above.

Polens.storeIntro: Buy Polens to use inside Freelandoo: activate profiles, stand out in the showcase and unlock exclusive features.
Polens.featuredDesc: Pay by card and get the Polens in your wallet in seconds.
Polens.noPackagesNowDesc: Check back soon. New packages show up here as soon as they're created.
Polens.securePaymentNote: Secure payment via Stripe. Polens are credited automatically after confirmation.
Polens.noPackagesYetDesc: No packages available yet. Check back soon.
Polens.cardDefaultDesc: Get the Polens straight to your wallet.
Polens.paymentConfirmedMsg: Your Polens have been credited to your wallet. The balance appears in moments.
Polens.purchaseCanceledMsg: You came back without finishing the payment. Try again whenever you like.

Manifestation.subtitle: Unlock manifestation banners with Polens or card and apply one to your profile's headcard. Once unlocked, it's yours forever.
Manifestation.ownedHint: Apply one to your headcard or remove the one in use.
Manifestation.paymentConfirmedMsg: Your manifestation has been unlocked. Click "Use on profile" to apply it.
Manifestation.appliedMsg: Done, it now shows on your profile's headcard.
Manifestation.removedMsg: Your manifestation left the headcard. It stays in your owned list.

Premium.title: Want to feature this profile?
Premium.subtitle: Put your profile in the spotlight of the showcase.
Premium.activeUntilPost: Come back to buy again when it expires.
Premium.perk1Rest: in the swarm and profession showcases in your city.
Premium.perk2Rest: appears on the card and inside the profile.
Premium.perk3: Card with background and border in your swarm's color, with glow and a standout black button.

Order.taxaSubtitle: Activate your profile by paying the fee.
Order.payActivateNote: Once you pay, your profile will be activated and visible on the platform.
Order.paymentInDev: Payment integration under development. You'll be able to pay soon.

Home.home_seller_hero_headline: Sell services, courses, products and *earn* as an affiliate.
Home.home_seller_hero_subcopy: Freelandoo connects people who want to *make money* with those who need to learn, create, buy and build. Anywhere.
Home.home_seller_path_afiliado_desc: Promote and earn with products, services and courses you believe in.
Home.home_seller_path_cursos_desc: Create and sell your online courses with all the tools you need.
Home.home_seller_path_produtos_desc: Sell physical, digital products and infoproducts on the platform.
Home.home_seller_path_servicos_desc: Showcase your services and connect with clients looking for talent.
Home.home_seller_path_influenciador_desc: Monetize your audience by recommending what you believe in.
Home.home_seller_final_headline: Services, courses, products, affiliates, influencers and opportunities. *All in one place.*
Home.home_seller_final_subcopy: Freelandoo is for those who want to sell, teach, learn and earn more every day.
